mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE (userno, noticetitle, noticepost) VALUES (#{userno}, #{noticetitle}, #{noticepost})
mapper.select: SELECT noticeno, noticetitle, noticepost, noticedate, noticeview, userno FROM NOTICE ORDER BY noticeno DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET noticetitle = #{noticetitle}, noticepost = #{noticepost}, noticeupdatedate = SYSDATE WHERE noticeno = #{noticeno}
